# kSecUseKeychain

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a keychain to operate on.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecUseKeychain: CFString
```

## Discussion

Specifies a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychain] object that references the keychain to which [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemAdd(_:_:)] should add the provided items.
title: kSecUseKeychain
